ddls:
CREATE TABLE "education_goals" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education goal detail */,
  "education_goal_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the education goal that this detail is associated with */,
  "set_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the set to which the education goal belongs */,
  "documentation_type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the type of documentation associated with the education goal */,
  "documentation_value" TEXT /* Value of the documentation, providing context or support for the education goal */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the education goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education goal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., Active, Inactive, Draft) */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link the goal to a specific educational program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_goals_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_goals_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES sets ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_goals_documentation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("documentation_type_id") REFERENCES documentation_types ("documentation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation_types" (
  "documentation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation type */,
  "documentation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the documentation type (e.g., Curriculum Guide, Assessment Standard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description that explains the purpose of this documentation type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation type was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the documentation type (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("documentation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sets" (
  "set_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each set of education goals */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal set (e.g., SetA, SetB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description providing context about the goal set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the set was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the set (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the program (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link the user to a specific role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Educator, Student) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
